steps.title: Interpret the function
steps.content: $W(x) = 4x + 80$ gives total time (minutes) to water $x$ plants and mow the grass. The $4x$ term scales with the number of plants (4 minutes per plant). The constant $80$ doesn't depend on $x$ — that's the mowing time.

steps.title: Verify with x = 0
steps.content:
If $x = 0$ (no plants watered), $W(0) = 4(0) + 80 = 80$ minutes — time for mowing alone.

The answer is 80.
